description: Evaluates upgrade and patch management service maturity—processes for enterprise and third-party assets, KPIs/KRIs, orchestration for network/endpoint/application systems, policies, dedicated teams, and SOC logging.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: An upgrade and patch management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Service for applications, devices, and systems

capabilities.name: Upgrade and patch management process
capabilities.description: An asset-neutral upgrade and patch management process is adopted, automated, and reviewed.

capabilities.name: Upgrade and patch management business process for third party and supply chain
capabilities.description: Third-party and supply chain patch management is formalized, scoped, automated, and reviewed.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Upgrade and patch KPIs/KRIs are documented, scoped, and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Upgrade and patch management system
capabilities.description: Centralized upgrade orchestration for network, endpoint, and application assets with automation, review, and integration.
evaluation_focus: Integration with compliance and vulnerability management

capabilities.name: Upgrade and patch management policy
capabilities.description: Formal policies for device, network, and application patching apply enterprise-wide and are reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Upgrade and patch management hierarchy model
capabilities.description: Dedicated teams handle device, network, and application upgrades across all relevant assets.

capabilities.name: Upgrade and patch management service logging
capabilities.description: Upgrade and patch activity is formally logged and securely transferred to the SOC, including dynamic changes.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
